notes: Qbox finance/garage fix + finance menu UI. On Qbox the vehicle row was created through qbx_vehicles:CreatePlayerVehicle with a top-level plate field that export does not have, so the row got a RANDOM plate while the spawned car, the keys and the loan used the real one - garages listed an unknown car, the real one could not be parked, and repo deleted nothing. The full property set (with the plate) is now passed via props. The /financemenu panel is now height-capped at 90vh (it could overflow the screen on smaller resolutions), loan rows act as an accordion, and an expanded dropdown scrolls itself fully into view instead of leaving the breakdown and pay buttons cut off.
